title: Small devices
description: Make your review during PvP bigger with the help of a resource pack that reduces swords and other tools!
body:
![Small tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1faaa548659c589e640f8b43041343746178460d.png)
# Description
The rsource pack replace a tools to small tools for more space on screen
# Items
- Netherite sword/axe
- Diamond sword/axe
- brush
- totem of undying
- golden/enchanted apples
- ender pearle
- ender eye
- lighter
- scissors
- leash
- Mace
- Trident
- spyglass

  ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d7a564d64841a0b42e21c73231ae9cfea4c2e0_0.webp)
